title: sterculia marseillei
intro: Sterculia marseillei, also known as the 'gurjan' or 'marseille sterculia', is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to tropical Asia and Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sterculia marseillei include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its seeds, bark, and roots are used in traditional herbal remedies.
